commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

New flow: check npm → install npm if needed → check claude → install claude if needed

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace raw <a href="/"> with <Link> component from next/link
to satisfy @next/next/no-html-link-for-pages lint rule.

Improve mobile PageSpeed performance (LCP & TBT)

- Replace framer-motion in hero with CSS animations to reduce main thread blocking

Fix card persistence: media cards, link cards, and images no longer disappear

  (clicking them now selects, like images, instead of opening empty editor)
- Don't delete entries with empty text if they have mediaCardData
- Exclude media card URLs from link card generation (prevents Spotify → link card)

- Filter out media card URLs during entry loading to prevent duplicate cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Asset Lesson 03 — Mesh Processing (#194)

* Add Asset Lesson 03 — Mesh Processing

Adds a C mesh processing tool and Python pipeline plugin for vertex
deduplication, index optimization, MikkTSpace tangent generation, and
LOD simplification. The tool reads OBJ files and writes binary .fmesh
files designed for direct GPU upload.

New tools and APIs:
- forge_mesh_tool (tools/mesh/) — C CLI wrapping meshoptimizer + MikkTSpace
- MeshPlugin (pipeline/plugins/mesh.py) — subprocess-based pipeline plugin
- .fmesh binary format — 32-byte header + LOD entries + vertex/index data

Files added:
- tools/mesh/main.c — C mesh processing tool (769 lines)
- tools/mesh/CMakeLists.txt — FetchContent for meshoptimizer + MikkTSpace
- lessons/assets/03-mesh-processing/README.md — lesson documentation
- lessons/assets/03-mesh-processing/pipeline.toml — sample config
- lessons/assets/03-mesh-processing/assets/raw/cube.obj — sample mesh
- tests/pipeline/test_mesh.py — 20 mock-based tests (all passing)
- Diagrams: mesh_pipeline.png, lod_simplification.png

Also updates:
- pipeline/plugins/mesh.py — real implementation replacing no-op placeholder
- scripts/forge_diagrams/ — 2 new diagram functions registered
- third_party/sdl3_shim/SDL3/SDL.h — adds SDL_zero/SDL_zerop macros
- .gitignore — allow .obj files in assets/raw/ directories
- CMakeLists.txt, PLAN.md, lessons/assets/README.md — project integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove .gltf/.glb from MeshPlugin extensions until tool supports them
- Add --no-deduplicate flag to C tool and plumb deduplicate setting through
- Stop creating fake .fmesh when tool missing — return source path instead
- Add overflow guard for LOD index allocation
- Add ## Key concepts section to README, fix exercise text (lod_ratios→lod_levels)
- Pin MikkTSpace to commit 3e895b4 for reproducible builds
- Add test for deduplicate=False (21 tests total, all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fix README example output to show only .obj (not .gltf/.glb)
- Fix docstring to mention only OBJ (glTF deferred)
- Propagate MikkTSpace failure as error instead of warning
- Use memcpy for float→uint32 instead of union type-punning
- Reject filenames with JSON-unsafe characters in meta.json writer

commit.message:
Upgrade overnight tooling for real coverage convergence

probe_service.py: auto-fill required params from botocore shapes
  - SNS went from 8 working + 33 needs_params → 36 working + 0 needs_params
  - Builds fake ARNs, fills strings/ints/bools, recurses into structures
  - "needs_params" now means genuinely complex (multi-step resource chains)

compat_coverage.py: dynamic service discovery from registry
  - Was hardcoded to 23 services, now discovers all 147
  - Full picture: 2,264/9,168 = 24.7% (was reporting 54.2% over 23)

overnight.sh: pre-probes service, bakes results into prompt
  - Claude gets exact working/not-implemented lists, no guessing
  - Teaches resource-setup patterns (create → use → assert → cleanup)
  - Teaches "ResourceNotFoundException proves implementation" pattern

next_service.py: --max-total filter, skip massive services (>200 ops)

Fix ToC anchor navigation landing behind sticky headers

Sticky headings (h2–h6) stack at fixed offsets from the viewport top,
but scroll-margin-top was unset (0px). Clicking a ToC link scrolled
the target heading to viewport top where it was hidden behind the
sticky stack above it. Set scroll-margin-top equal to each level's
sticky top value so the browser accounts for the stacked headers.

commit.message:
fix: move ConvertTo-Json inside try block in log collector

PowerShell cannot pipe from "catch { }" — placing ConvertTo-Json after
the catch block caused an "empty pipe element" parse error, silently
preventing ALL log collection. Now ConvertTo-Json is inside the try
block and we use _ps() directly instead of _ps_json().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: update pricing plans - Starter $1.99/10 credits, Pro $4.99/50 credits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: always use /api/me for role instead of stale NextAuth JWT (#170)

The NextAuth JWT caches the role at login time and never refreshes it.
After migrating ADMIN→SUPERADMIN in DB, the JWT still contained 'ADMIN',
causing isAdmin() to return false and hiding edit/delete buttons.

Now loadCurrentUser() in all 3 dashboard pages always uses /api/me
(which reads from DB) instead of session?.user?.role from the JWT.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix upload success detection: use 'Hard resetting' not exit code

The post-reset serial port disconnect makes PIO report [FAILED] with
exit code 1 even on successful uploads. Now uses 'Hard resetting' from
esptool as the true success indicator — it means the flash write
completed and the board is rebooting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Super Agent Network: 10 specialized verification agents with orchestrator

Multi-agent verification system that validates every platform output through
parallel specialized agents. Each agent returns a 0-1 score; the orchestrator
computes a weighted trust score and routes agents by context (chat/policy/
simulation/gateway).

Agents: CitationVerifier, TemporalValidity, CrossJurisdiction,
LogicalConsistency, Completeness, Precedent, PlainLanguage, Adversarial,
RegulatoryIntent, AuditTrail.

API: POST /api/agents/verify, GET /api/agents/status
Frontend: TrustBadge component integrated into Chat responses showing
"Verified by N/M Agents | Trust Score: X%" with expandable agent details.

fix(work3): revert parallel scan to sequential scan to fix CUDA OOM

纯 PyTorch 并行关联扫描的 autograd 图在每步保存完整 (B,L,D,N)
中间张量，内存为 O(L log L)，后向网络 L=500 时导致 22GB 显存溢出。
改回顺序扫描 O(L) 内存，保留双向 Mamba 和全局池化改进。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(slack): add branding to Slack app manifest (#734)

## What
Update Slack app manifest to include Everruns branding in description
fields.

## Why
Users requested that the Slack bot manifest include "(Powered by
Everruns)" branding and a longer description with the Everruns URL.

Note: Slack manifests don't support `icon_url` — icons must be uploaded
manually via the Slack app settings UI after creation.

## How
- Changed `description` from static text to `"{app_name} (Powered by
Everruns)"` (dynamic, includes app name)
- Added `long_description` field: `"AI agent powered by Everruns —
https://everruns.com"`
- Extracted `build_manifest_yaml()` helper for testability
- Added 3 tests: content verification, Slack 140-char limit check,
special character escaping

## Risk
- Low
- Only changes static string templates in manifest YAML generation
- All values go through `yaml_escape()` — no injection risk
- Description stays well within Slack's 140-char limit

## Checklist
- [x] Tests added or updated
- [x] Backward compatibility considered

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
